body: pyflakes reports three 'local variable remote_repo is assigned to but never used' warnings in scripts/tests/test_gittoc.py (lines 928, 1115, 1121). Each is a call to self.init_with_remote() whose return value is no longer needed by the test body. Fix: discard with a bare 'self.init_with_remote()' (no assignment) or rename to '_remote_repo' to signal intent. Keeps pyflakes output clean so real issues stand out.
title: remove unused remote_repo locals in test_gittoc.py
